hero_subtitle: SFTY helps crypto exchanges consolidate FCA regulatory rules, onboarding, Travel Rule operations, case management and audit evidence into one coherent compliance workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance workflows slow down without orchestration
problem_description: Exchanges struggle to meet FCA requirements when compliance tasks remain siloed across multiple providers and jurisdictions. This fragmentation leads to manual handoffs, inconsistent decision records, and challenges maintaining clear audit evidence for regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, jurisdictional rules, case management and audit evidence into one unified workflow so FCA-regulated exchanges can streamline compliance tasks and maintain clear regulatory records.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors FCA regulatory changes and maps updates into internal compliance rules for review routing, case creation, decision logging, evidence preservation and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Clear compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented FCA exchange compliance inputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to support clearer operational control and audit-ready review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated exchanges with structured workflows, audit-ready evidence and secure deployment to meet FCA operational requirements and support bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FCA-regulated exchanges?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps FCA-regulated exchanges connect onboarding, Travel Rule, case management and reporting workflows into one controlled compliance layer aligned with FCA requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support FCA compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures reviews, alerts, decision logs, provider outputs and regulatory changes into FCA-specific workflows for onboarding, transaction monitoring and Travel Rule handling.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve FCA audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence, decision records and case history with traceability across alerts, regulatory changes and operational responses for FCA inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs within existing FCA compliance stacks and policies.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace FCA compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers, turning their outputs into structured FCA workflows without replacing underlying compliance or Travel Rule systems.
final_title: Structure FCA compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects onboarding, Travel Rule, regulatory rules and audit evidence into FCA exchange operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
